docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUIS VILLALOBOS, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUIS VILLALOBOS, SR. COLLECTION'S OFFICER. DEFENDANT SALVADOR M. MALDONADO IS NOT PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE CASE IS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,504.63 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO, SALVADOR M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-09-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SALVADOR M. MALDONADO IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
